title: Yuasa NP7-12 12V 7Ah VRLA Battery
body_html:
Genuine Yuasa NP7-12 12V 7Ah sealed lead-acid (VRLA) battery for fire alarm control panels and emergency lighting.

  • 12V 7Ah capacity — standard panel standby size
  • Maintenance-free AGM / VRLA construction
  • Flame-retardant ABS case
  • Faston 4.8mm terminals
  • Suitable for BS 5839 fire systems and BS 5266 emergency lighting
  • Typical standby life 3–5 years depending on ambient temperature

Indicative UK trade guide price. Confirm live distributor pricing before large orders.
